BSE Limited 
Corporate Relationship Department, 
Phiroze Jeejeebhoy Towers, 
25th Floor, Dalal Street, 
Fort, Mumbai - 400 001

National Stock Exchange of India Limited

Sandra (East), 
Mumbai - 400 051 
Sub: 
Intimation under Regulation 29 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure 
Requirements) Regulations, 2015 ["Listing Regulations"] 
Reg: 
Board Meeting to be held on Thursday, November 7, 2019 and the Earnings call 
Stock Code: BSE - 532927 
NSE- ECLERX 
This is to inform you that a Meeting of Board of Directors of the Company will be held on Thursday, 
November 7, 2019, inter-alia, to approve and take on record Un-audited Financial Results 
(Consolidated and Standalone) of the Company for the quarter and half year ended September 30, 
2019. 
Pursuant to the Code of Conduct of the Company under the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) 
Regulations, 2015, the Trading Window for dealing in securities of the Company has been closed 
with effect from October 1, 2019, and will remain closed until48 hours after the outcome of the Board 
meeting is announced. 
Further, the earnings call for the Un-audited financial results for the quarter and half year ended 
September 30, 2019 will be held on the same day and the earnings call details as enclosed herewith, 
will also be available on the Company's website www.eclerx.com. 
It is requested to take note of the same. 
Thanking you, 
Yours faithfully 
For eCierx eJ_ces Limited 
(!~ 
Pratik Bhanushali 
* 
Company Secretary & Compliance Officer 
F8538

eClerx Services Ltd. to announce Q2 FY20 results on November 7th, 2019;  
Earnings Call to be conducted on the same day 
 
Mumbai, October 31st, 2019: eClerx Services Ltd. (eCx), (BSE: 532927), (NSE: ECLERX), an industry-
focused Data Analytics and Business Process Management firm, will announce its Second Quarter and 
Half Year FY20 results on Thursday, November 7th, 2019. The earnings call for the results would be 
held on the same day and the earnings details will also be available on the company’s website, 
www.eclerx.com  
 
The Details of Earnings Conference Call are: 
 
Date: November 7th, 2019  
 
Time (IST): 6:30 PM – 7:30 PM 
 
Universal Access: +91 22 6280 1107 / 7115 8008  
The number listed above is universally accessible from all networks and all countries 
 
Local Access Number: +91-7045671221 
Available all over India  
 
International Toll Free Numbers:  
 
USA - 1 866 746 2133 
UK - 0 808 101 1573 
Singapore - 800 101 2045 
Hong Kong - 800 964 448 
Italy - 008 001 424 3444 
Thailand - 0 018 001 424 3444   
 
Management Representation from eClerx Services Ltd. 
 
Mr. PD Mundhra, Executive Director 
Mr. Anjan Malik, Director 
Mr. Rohitash Gupta, Chief Financial Officer 
 
Participants are requested to log in 10 minutes prior to the start of the scheduled call.  
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
eClerx Services Limited  
Q2 FY20 Earnings Call Invite  

 
 
About eClerx Services Ltd: 
 
eClerx provides critical business operations, analytics and automation services to over seventy five 
Global 2000 clients, including some of the world’s leading companies across financial services, cable 
& telecom, retail, fashion, luxury, media & entertainment, manufacturing, travel & leisure, software 
and high-tech. Incorporated in 2000, eClerx is one of India’s leading business process management 
and data analytics companies and is today traded on both the Bombay and National Stock Exchanges 
of India. eClerx employs about 9,500 people across its global sites in the US, UK, India, Canada, Italy, 
Germany, Singapore and Thailand. eClerx’s technology R&D center in Mumbai is recognized by Govt. 
of India's Department for Scientific & Industrial Research. This center does research using technologies 
that include Big-data, Analytics, Machine Learning & Robotics Process Automations and has 
successfully commercialized many leading products including our flagship Robotics platform 
Roboworx®.  
 
For more information, please visit www.eclerx.com 
 
For further information, please contact: 
 
Pratik Bhanushali 
eClerx Services 
Tel: +91 22 6614 8300 
Email: Pratik.Bhanushali@eclerx.com    
Asha Gupta 
Christensen IR 
Tel: +91 22 4215 0210 
Email: agupta@christensenir.com
